mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.name as project_name, u.username, u.real_name, ref.username as referee_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM result r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ref ON r.referee_id = ref.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, p.name as project_name, u.username, u.real_name, ref.username as referee_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM result r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ref ON r.referee_id = ref.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, p.name as project_name, u.username, u.real_name, ref.username as referee_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM result r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ref ON r.referee_id = ref.id WHERE r.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY r.score ASC

SELECT r.*, p.name as project_name, u.username, u.real_name, ref.username as referee_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM result r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ref ON r.referee_id = ref.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, p.name as project_name, u.username, u.real_name, ref.username as referee_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM result r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ref ON r.referee_id = ref.id WHERE r.referee_id = #{refereeId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, p.name as project_name, u.username, u.real_name, ref.username as referee_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM result r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ref ON r.referee_id = ref.id WHERE r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT s.id as schedule_id, p.name as project_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status, rt.status as task_status, rt.id as task_id FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN referee_task rt ON s.id = rt.schedule_id AND rt.referee_id = #{refereeId} WHERE (rt.referee_id = #{refereeId} AND rt.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ONGOING', 'FINISHED')) AND s.status IN ('已结束', 'FINISHED', 'COMPLETED') UNION SELECT DISTINCT s.id as schedule_id, p.name as project_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status, 'COMPLETED' as task_status, NULL as task_id FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE s.status IN ('已结束', 'FINISHED', 'COMPLETED') AND s.id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT schedule_id FROM result WHERE referee_id = #{refereeId} ) AND s.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT schedule_id FROM registration WHERE status = 'APPROVED' )

SELECT reg.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, s.id as schedule_id, p.name as project_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM registration reg LEFT JOIN user u ON reg.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON reg.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE reg.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND reg.status = 'APPROVED' AND reg.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM result WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} )

SELECT r.*, p.name as project_name, u.username, u.real_name, ref.username as referee_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status FROM result r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ref ON r.referee_id = ref.id WHERE r.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY r.score ASC

SELECT DISTINCT s.id as schedule_id, p.name as project_name, s.venue, s.date as schedule_date, s.time as schedule_time, s.status as schedule_status, rt.status as apply_status FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN referee_task rt ON s.id = rt.schedule_id AND rt.referee_id = #{refereeId} WHERE rt.referee_id = #{refereeId} AND rt.status = 'PENDING' AND s.status IN ('已结束', 'FINISHED', 'COMPLETED')
